sections.title: Welcome to Redis Docs
sections.description: Redis is an open-source, in-memory data structure store used as a database, cache, message broker, and streaming engine.

get_started.name: Redis Cloud quick start
get_started.description: Set up a Free Redis-managed database on AWS, GCP, or Azure.

get_started.name: Get started with Redis Open Source
get_started.description: Install and start using Redis locally.

genai.name: Redis with RAG
genai.description: Get started using Redis for retrieval augmented generation.

genai.name: Redis for AI docs and code examples

tools.name: Redis Insight
tools.description: GUI tool for Redis database visualization.

sections.title: Data Types
sections.description: Redis implements the following data types for various use cases.

core_types.name: Strings
core_types.description: The most basic Redis data type, representing a sequence of bytes.

core_types.name: Lists
core_types.description: Lists of strings sorted by insertion order.

core_types.name: Sets
core_types.description: Unordered collections of unique strings with O(1) add/remove/test.

core_types.name: Hashes
core_types.description: Record types modeled as collections of field-value pairs.

core_types.name: Sorted Sets
core_types.description: Collections of unique strings ordered by associated score.

advanced_types.name: Vector Sets
advanced_types.description: High-dimensional vector data for ML, recommendations, semantic search. Supports HNSW algorithm and cosine similarity.

advanced_types.name: Streams
advanced_types.description: Append-only log data structure for recording events in order.

advanced_types.name: Geospatial Indexes
advanced_types.description: Finding locations within geographic radius or bounding box.

advanced_types.name: Bitfields
advanced_types.description: Multiple counters with atomic get/set/increment operations.

advanced_types.name: JSON
advanced_types.description: Structured, hierarchical arrays and key-value objects matching JSON format.

probabilistic_types.name: Bloom Filter
probabilistic_types.description: Check for presence/absence of an element in a set.

probabilistic_types.name: Cuckoo Filter
probabilistic_types.description: Similar to Bloom filters with different trade-offs.

time_series.name: Time Series
time_series.description: Dedicated time series data type for IoT, monitoring, financial data.

data_management.name: Redis Input/Output Tool (RIOT)
data_management.description: Migrate data from files, databases, or snapshots.

data_management.name: Redis Data Integration
data_management.description: Sync with live data from disk-based databases.
